name: @tourism/api
description: NestJS 11 REST API for a Lily-style tourism booking platform (part of an Nx + pnpm monorepo), backed by Prisma/Postgres (Supabase) with Stripe and PayPal payments, Cloudinary media, Resend email, and pg-boss background jobs. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
